title: ANC - 2b-Change ANC to Off during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: ANC turns ON and Transparency is greyed out during a call when ANC was OFF and Transparency ON before the call, with mode behavior varying by device after call ends
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
6. Observe the ANC and Transparency status during the call.
7. During the call, tap Transparency Mode in the app.
8. During the call, set ANC to OFF.
9. End the call and return to the Home screen.
10. Observe the ANC and Transparency status after the call.
expected:
1. ANC is OFF, Transparency is ON before the call.
2. During the call: ANC turns ON with the previously selected ANC option; Transparency becomes greyed out and turned OFF.
3. Tapping Transparency during the call shows a popup that the option is unavailable.
4. Turning ANC OFF during the call sets ANC to OFF with no selected value.
5. After the call ends: Transparency becomes accessible again (OFF on Emu/Osprey/Tern devices, ON on Lark/Peregrine devices). The user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes.
